uplink.description: weather report frame: mid-range conditions (1013 hPa, 25 C, 55% RH, 4.47 m/s wind @ 180 deg, 2 mm/h rain, 5 mm day rain, UV 3, 650 W/m2 solar)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data derived via the ORACLE method by running reference/upstream-codec.js parseWeather over these bytes and mapping its variables onto the normalized vocabulary (pressure->air.pressure, outsideTemperature->air.temperature, outsideHumidity->air.relativeHumidity, windSpeed/windDirection->wind.*, rainRate->rain.intensity, dayRain->rain.cumulative). Header bytes: 0x0B uplinkId, 0x20 subtype nibble 0x2, 0x00 weather report type.

uplink.description: weather report frame: cold calm edge case (1019.3 hPa, 0 C, 88% RH, 0 m/s wind @ 359 deg, 0 mm/h rain, 0.2 mm day rain, UV 0, 5 W/m2 solar)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data derived via the ORACLE method from reference/upstream-codec.js parseWeather. Wind direction 359 deg exercises the <360 bound; pressure 1019.3 hPa stays within the 900-1100 atmospheric range.
Synthetic: uplinkId 0x01 (time-sync) is not the 0x0B weather report frame this codec handles.

uplink.description: truncated weather frame (correct header, fewer than 33 bytes)
uplink._note: Synthetic: valid 0x0B/0x2/0x00 header but the fixed weather block is incomplete.
